title: uniqThetaIntersect does not works for empty merge states
description:
### Company or project name
Summarization
### Describe what's wrong
I am trying to merge the theta sketches based on some predicate, If the predicate results in no sketch being selected then intersect returns the count from first sketch, wherein the result should be 0.
Fiddle [Link](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/090ba1db-65cc-4425-b3f4-4939579990a7)
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```sql
CREATE TABLE TEST_AGG(
CID UInt32,
USERS AggregateFunction(uniqTheta, UInt32)
) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY CID;
INSERT INTO TEST_AGG VALUES (1, arrayReduce('uniqThetaState', [1, 2]::Array(UInt32))), (2, arrayReduce('uniqThetaState', [2, 3]::Array(UInt32)));
SELECT finalizeAggregation(
uniqThetaIntersect(
uniqThetaMergeStateIf(USERS, CID = 1),
uniqThetaMergeStateIf(USERS, CID = 3)
)
) FROM TEST_AGG;
```
### Expected behavior
The final select query should return 0 as the result, because there was an empty state to intersect with it.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST_AGG_1(CID INT UNSIGNED, USERS JSON);
INSERT INTO TEST_AGG_1 VALUES (1, JSON_ARRAY(1, 2)), (2, JSON_ARRAY(2, 3));
CREATE TABLE TEST_AGG_2(CID INT UNSIGNED, USERS JSON);
INSERT INTO TEST_AGG_2 VALUES (3, JSON_ARRAY(4, 5)), (4, JSON_ARRAY(6));
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(USERS)), 0) FROM TEST_AGG_1 WHERE CID = 1 AND CID NOT IN (SELECT CID FROM TEST_AGG_2 WHERE CID = 5);
key_bug_features: uniqThetaIntersect fails with empty merge states
